---
title: 'crmPack Training for Merck'
description: 'Basic and advanced training for crmPack users at Merck'
author:
  - "{{< var author-sabanes >}}"  
affiliation: "RPACT"
date: 2026-03-31
date-format: long
institute: "[RPACT](https://www.rpact.com)"
image: figures/logos/logo_full.png
lang: en
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 120
---

**Welcome to the crmPack Training for Merck!** 

This website is accessible at
[crmPack Training for Merck](https://crmpack-training.merck.2026.rpact.com).

**Details**

- 🧑‍💻 Presenter: Daniel Sabanés Bové
  ([RPACT GmbH](https://www.rpact.com))
- 📍 Location: Online 

## [{{< fa calendar-check >}}]{.yellow} Agenda
 
- [Basic Training](/parts/01_basic.qmd)
  - 🗓 Date: 2026-03-31
  - 🕒 Time: 2:00 PM –  3:00 PM CEST (Germany)
- [Advanced Training](/parts/02_advanced.qmd)
  - 🗓 Date: 2026-04-21
  - 🕒 Time: 10:30 AM – 11:30 AM CEST (Germany)
